faqs.question: What are the most common pantry pests in North Bergen homes?
faqs.answer: North Bergen residents most frequently encounter Indian meal moths, saw-toothed grain beetles, cigarette beetles, and flour beetles. These pests infest dry goods like cereals, flour, rice, pasta, nuts, dried fruits, and spices. They can enter homes through contaminated groceries or find their way through small cracks and gaps.
